title: Integrate with the Invoicing API
excerpt: Learn how to create and send an invoice with code. The [Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/invoices) is the most common way to [create invoices](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/dashboard.md#create-invoice). If you’d like to automate invoice creation, you can integrate with the API. Build a full, working Invoicing integration using our [sample integration](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/integration/quickstart.md). Use our official libraries for access to the Stripe API: curl https://api.stripe.com/v1/products \ [Prices](https://docs.stripe.com/api.md#prices) define how much and how often to charge for products. This includes how much the product costs, what currency to use, and the billing interval (when the price is for a subscription).…
